name: security-audit-static-analysis
description: ソースコード静的解析セキュリティ診断サービスの決定的実行エンジン。preflight ゲート → semgrep 静的解析 → レッドチーム多視点による脆弱性仮説の発散 → ブルーチームによる相互批判で検証 → 検証済み所見を統一 content-JSON(title/summary/sections/tables/callouts)に合成する。security-audit-service ワークフローの static_analysis フェーズが pipeline_ref から参照する。所見の重大度較正・ADR 突合・レポート執筆は後続の判断フェーズ(findings_alignment/report_r1)が担う。

context.reference_standards: OWASP SCVS, Solana/Anchor Security Best Practices, project ADR

params.topic: Enumerate concrete, exploitable security weaknesses in {{target_dir}}. Reason from the static-analysis signal and the source itself, cross-checked against {{reference_standards}}. Static findings: {{semgrep_findings}}

params.instruction: You are the lead auditor. From the verified vulnerability hypotheses, produce a findings document as a single JSON object with this exact shape: { "title": string, "summary": string, "sections": [ { "heading": string, "body": string[], "tables"?: [{ "title": string, "columns": string[], "rows": string[][] }], "callouts"?: [{ "title": string, "tone": "info"|"warning"|"critical", "body": string }] } ] }. Requirements: (1) assign each finding a stable ID FIND-01, FIND-02, ...; (2) rate each with severity Critical/High/Medium/Low/Informational and note its recommended remediation timing; (3) each finding section MUST include 該当箇所 (file:line), リスク, and 推奨策; (4) include one section titled '指摘事項一覧' with a table of ID/severity/status(Open); (5) drop hypotheses the blue-team critique refuted. Reference standards: {{reference_standards}}. Output ONLY the JSON object.

params.message: 🔎 [SEC-AUDIT] Static analysis complete. Findings: {{mission_evidence_dir}}/audit-findings.json — hand off to findings_alignment for severity calibration and ADR reconciliation.
